description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named basic test that runs on push to any tag and branch master, and on pull requests to branches master and feature-2.0. The workflow consists of three jobs: simple-checks, unit-tests, and integration-tests, all running on ubuntu-latest. simple-checks checks out the code, sets up Python 3.11, and runs pre-commit checks. unit-tests and integration-tests check out the code, set up Python 3.11, install dependencies with uv and pip, and run tox with various environments and configurations.
